_comment: P3d round 2 — cross-runtime co-error measurement. Author each golden INDEPENDENTLY from the stated definition + convention (big-endian, q0=MSB, U[out,in], up to global phase). cnot_std is a known-answer sanity control; cnot_lower is the probe (control=q1, NOT the standard CNOT).

intents.definition: Standard CNOT: control = q0 (the FIRST / MSB qubit), target = q1. Flip q1 iff q0=1. Basis |q0 q1>, index = 2*q0 + q1.
CNOT with control = q1 (the SECOND / LSB qubit), target = q0 (MSB). Flip q0 iff q1=1. This is NOT the standard CNOT — author from this exact wiring. Basis |q0 q1>, index = 2*q0 + q1.
